title: helichrysum pholidotum
intro: Helichrysum pholidotum, also known as African Helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum pholidotum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Helichrysum pholidotum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
